body.purpose: Primary reading text, descriptions, paragraph content.

label.purpose: Form labels, table headers, navigation items.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, reveal).

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Image scale transitions and reveal animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Light button on dark background — the spotlight effect.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.92 0.01 250); color: oklch(0.14 0.015 250); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.83 0.01 250); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.2 250 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Bordered, transparent. For dismissive or non-primary calls.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid oklch(0.37 0.006 250); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0.008 250); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.2 250 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Used for report cards, fighter info, stat cards, detail sections.
components.html:
Título do Card

Conteúdo do card. Texto descritivo ou metadados.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.20 0.01 250); border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.37 0.006 250); padding: 1.5rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { } .ds-card-text { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250); margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input for email, password, search, and text data.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); line-height: 1; } .ds-input { height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.14 0.015 250); color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: inherit; border: 1px solid oklch(0.37 0.006 250); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250); } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.2 250 / 0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Status Badge — Pending
components.description: Shows a report is awaiting review. Neutral secondary tone.
components.css: .ds-badge-pending { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.27 0.008 250); color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.25rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Badge — Approved
components.description: Confirmed legitimate report. Green semantic color.
components.css: .ds-badge-approved { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.723 0.219 149.579); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.25rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Badge — Rejected
components.description: Report denied by admin. Red destructive color.
components.css: .ds-badge-rejected { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.25rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Report Card (Homepage)
components.description: Image-first grid card with hover overlay and lightbox dialog, on blue-toned dark background.
components.html:
Reporter → Reported

Comentário da denúncia.

26/05/2026
components.css: .ds-report-card { background: oklch(0.20 0.01 250); border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.37 0.006 250); overflow: hidden; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); } .ds-report-image-wrap { position: relative; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; } .ds-report-image-wrap::before { content: ''; display: block; padding-top: 66%; background: oklch(0.27 0.008 250); } .ds-report-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: oklch(0.92 0.01 250 / 0.6); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-report-card:hover .ds-report-overlay { opacity: 1; } .ds-report-info { padding: 0.75rem 1rem 0.5rem; text-align: center; } .ds-report-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-report-comment { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250); margin: 0; } .ds-report-footer { padding: 0.75rem 1rem; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.37 0.006 250); font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250); }

components.name: Image Upload Zone
components.description: Drag-and-drop file upload area with dashed border, icon, and select button.
components.html:
Arraste a imagem aqui

ou

JPEG apenas
components.css: .ds-upload-zone { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 2px dashed oklch(0.71 0.01 250 / 0.3); background: oklch(0.27 0.008 250 / 0.2); cursor: pointer; text-align: center; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-upload-zone:hover { border-color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250 / 0.5); background: oklch(0.27 0.008 250 / 0.3); } .ds-upload-icon { color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250); } .ds-upload-text { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250); margin: 0; } .ds-upload-small { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250); margin: 0; } .ds-upload-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.27 0.008 250); color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-upload-btn:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0.008 250 / 0.8); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Top bar navigation item. Muted default, bright on hover.
components.html: PainelNova DenúnciaPerfilSair
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.71 0.01 250); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); } .ds-nav-link-logout { cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview:
The interface is the arena. Deep blue-black backdrop, bright central action, no distractions around the edges. Like a fighting game tournament stage under a cool arena light: the player's evidence is the only thing that matters, and everything else exists to support it without competing.

This system is built for the Brazilian Street Fighter 6 community — players who just finished a ranked match where the opponent disconnected, frustrated but looking for a constructive outlet. The design serves that moment: fast to enter, clear to read, honest about what it is. No corporate polish, no gamer theatrics. Just a well-lit table where proof is examined and calls are made.

The system explicitly rejects generic dark SaaS aesthetics, neon/cyberpunk gaming tropes, and false authority badges.
keyCharacteristics: Blue-black canvas with tonal depth through contrast, not shadows
Single near-white spotlight accent against cool blue-toned neutrals
Desaturated signal blue for interactive states and focus indicators
System fonts throughout — one family, no pairing
Evidence-first layouts: images centered, chrome receded
Tactile responsiveness on every interactive element
pt-BR language throughout — the interface speaks to the community in its own voice

rules.name: The Single Spotlight Rule
rules.body: The `match-light` accent occupies at most 10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what makes it read as the focus. Applying it to backgrounds, decorative elements, or more than one competing element per viewport dilutes the whole system.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is communicated through lightness steps, not shadows. `deep-canvas` → `dark-ash` → `muted-stone` form a three-step elevation ladder. No surface at rest carries a box-shadow. This rule keeps the ring feeling flat, honest, and grounded.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: `signal-blue` is reserved for focus and interaction feedback only — never as a surface color or page accent. It signals that an element is interactive, not decorative.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: No display fonts, no serif/sans pairings, no variable font axes to animate. Every piece of text uses the same system stack. Differentiation comes from weight (400/500/600/700) and scale, not family changes.

rules.name: The Flat Surface Rule
rules.body: A surface at rest has no shadow. Elevation cues exist only through tonal layer shifts. If a card needs to feel 'higher,' move it one lightness step: card to popover (`dark-ash` to `muted-stone` border). Do not add a shadow.

dos: Do use the three tonal steps (canvas → ash → stone) for surface hierarchy. It's the only elevation tool you need.
Do lead with the image. Report cards center proof screenshots; lightboxes open them full-width. Evidence is the hero.
Do use `match-light` sparingly. One primary action per view. The spotlight only hits one spot.
Do reserve `signal-blue` for focus rings and interaction states only — never as a surface or accent.
Do write in pt-BR with the warmth and directness of the Brazilian fighting game community. "Playful, sharp, clear" — like a tournament referee who has seen it all (PRODUCT.md).
Do use system fonts everywhere. No `@font-face`, no Google Fonts, no variable fonts. The platform's native typeface is the right one.
Do show skeleton loading for tables, cards, and detail views. Never show a spinner in the middle of content.
Do keep buttons responsive at 150ms transitions. The ring is a fast place.
Do use 65–75ch line length for prose sections. Data tables can run wider.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, list items, or alerts. Use full borders, background tints, or nothing — never a stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Emphasis is for weight and size only.
Don't apply glassmorphism (blurs, glass cards) as a default. The interface is flat and honest, not glossy.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent). This is a community tool, not a SaaS landing page.
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly. Vary the card types.
Don't use modals as a first thought — exhaust inline and progressive disclosure alternatives first (PRODUCT.md: "Respect the user's time").
Don't use neon, cyberpunk, or RGB-gamer aesthetic — no excessive glow, no forced gaming tropes (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't add badges, trust seals, or "enterprise" signaling. False authority has no place here (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't make the design look like a generic dark SaaS admin panel. This is the Brazilian SF6 community's tool, not a corporate dashboard (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't use `signal-blue` as a surface color or decorative backdrop. It belongs on focus rings and interactive feedback only.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Use transition on opacity, transform, and color only. Ease with exponential curves (ease-out).
Don't use em dashes. Substitute commas, colons, semicolons, or periods.
Don't apply color to inactive states. Inactive means muted (dusk-text or muted-stone).
